name: Pumpkin, Rice and Apricots
recipeInstructions:
Or can substitute butternut or buttercup squash or sweet potatoes.
Heat oil in a wide skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook & stir occasionally until it begins to brown. Add pumpkin pieces to the skillet as you prepare it. Stir to coat.
Chop apricots and add to skillet along with salt and 3/4 cup water. Cover and simmer the mixture for 15 minutes. Add cooked rice and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until pumpkin is tender. Stir often as it cooks.
